title: rubus lianos
intro: Rubus lianos, also known as the cane raspberry or climbing raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of Rubus lianos include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Rubus lianos can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions in herbal medicine.
